result:
Build completed successfully — `wpa_supplicant`, `wpa_cli`, and `wpa_passphrase` all linked (the one remaining warning in `wpa_cli.c` is a pre-existing style warning, not an error). All 5 compile errors are fixed:

1. `src/utils/eloop.c:615` — `timeout->time.seconds` → `.sec` (struct `os_reltime` has no `seconds` field).
2. `wpa_supplicant/config_file.c:29` — `os_strlength` → `os_strlen`.
3. `src/rsn_supp/wpa.c:103` — `sm->pairwise_ciph` → `sm->pairwise_cipher`.
4. `wpa_supplicant/events.c:132` — `wpa_s->cur_ssid` → `wpa_s->current_ssid`.
5. `wpa_supplicant/scan.c:1137` — added missing 5th argument (`NULL`) to `eloop_register_timeout`, matching the sibling `eloop_deplete_timeout` call.
